title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Philip Ingram, a former Army Colonel and Intelligence Officer, has said the Scottish Government owned facility will “almost certainly” be supporting the war.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert Add Yahoo as a preferred source to see more of our stories on Google.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: -Credit:Alasdair MacLeod/Daily Record (Alasdair MacLeod/Daily Record) Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Donald Trump's forces to facilitate its bombing of Iran, according to a leading expert in military intelligence. Philip Ingram, a former Army Colonel and Intelligence Officer, has said the Scottish Government owned facility will “almost certainly” be supporting the war.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport is being used by Trump to bomb Iran, says military intelligence expert
